title: Clovercraft: Third Life 4
description: The official modpack for Campaign 4 of the Third Life series on Clovercraft MC.
body:
#Campaign 4 Modpack
This is the official modpack for Clovercraft: Third Life, Campaign 4. You are welcome to add optimization mods on top of this modpack, but we encourage you to play using the existing mods alone.

## Credits
The following creators work helped to make this modpack possible.

- [Chocolate Minecraft](https://chocolateminecraft.com/index.php) for both Xaero's World Map & Mini-Map
